summary: Created site/flake.nix providing nodejs_22 + pnpm; updated root flake.nix to include site as input; verified pnpm install and pnpm build succeed

commands_run.command: NIX_REMOTE=daemon nix --extra-experimental-features 'nix-command flakes' flake check (in site/)
NIX_REMOTE=daemon nix --extra-experimental-features 'nix-command flakes' flake check (in root)
